versions.version_description: Fixed missing chord highlight that was missing and cleaned up headers.
This version uses a capo on the 4th fret in order to play the hook similarly to the original.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,

                        Feel Good Inc. - Gorillaz

,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,,
Tabbed by : zen
email     : phoenician_zen_x@yahoo.com


[Intro]

       (for guitar, it's the variation if u go with guitar)

        [ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]    x4


      (bass tab, the original in that song)

[tab]       G|------------------------|
       D|------------------------|
       A|---------65-3-3-3-65----|
       E|-3-3-3-56-----------63--|[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
City breaking down on a camel's back.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
They'll just have to go coz they don't know wack[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
So all ya fill the streets it's appealing to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
And you won't get under-counted coz you're damn ass free[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
You got a new horizon it's an ephemeral style[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
in a melancholy town where we never smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
And all I wanna hear is the message beep[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
My dreams, they come a kissin' coz I don't get sleep no.....[/tab]


[Refrain]

[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
Windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Abm[/ch]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]
turn forever hand in hand[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]
take it all there on your stride[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Abm[/ch]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]
it is calling, fall...ing down[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ebm[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]
love forever, love is free[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Abm[/ch]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]
let's turn forever you and me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
windmill, windmill for the land[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Abm[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]
is everybody in?[/tab]


[Rap]

[tab]               [ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
laughing gas these hazmats, fast cats[/tab]
lining them up like ass cracks
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
lay these ponies at the track[/tab]
it's my chocolate attack
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
shit, I'm stepping[/tab]
in harder this year
care bear rappin'
it hotter this year
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
watch me as I gravitate ahaahahaha...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
gonna ghost town[/tab]
this motown
with yo sound
yo in the blink
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
goin' bite the dust[/tab]
can't fight with us
with your sound
you kill the INC.
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
so don't stop, get it, get it (get it!)[/tab]
until you're cheddar's heavy
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
watch the way I navigate ahaahahaha...[/tab]


[Refrain]

[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
don't stop, get it, get it (get it!)[/tab]
with your captains in it
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
steady, watch me navigate, ahaahahaha...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G5[/ch] X3 [ch]A5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch]
don't stop, get it, get it[/tab]
with your captains in it
[tab][ch]C5[/ch] X3 [ch]Eb5[/ch] [ch]D5[/ch] [ch]Bb5[/ch] [ch]G5[/ch]
steady, watch me navigate, ahaahahaha...[/tab]

(coda like the intro)
